title: BG Electrical Switched Fused Connection Unit, Fused Spur Switch, Double Pole, Raised and Slim Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Polished Chrome, 13A, NPC50
features: SLEEK AND SLIM POLISHED CHROME 13A SWITCHED FUSED CONNECTION UNIT: With double pole switching for peace of mind and safer installation. Embossed with FUSE on the fuse cover
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance
ENABLES POWER ISOLATION FROM THE MAINS ELECTRICITY SUPPLY: Ideal for spur circuits and hardwired appliances. Easy fuse access and control of hardwired or undercounter appliances

ANGLED COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires. Double pole switching and adheres to BS 1363 Part 4 regulations for a safer electrical installation. Fits a 35mm back box, ideal for retrofit
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switch. 25 years manufacturer's warranty included
